data.title: Metaplanet now in FTSE Japan Index, keeps stacking Bitcoin; Tokyo-listed firm added to FTSE Japan and All-World indices, buys more Bitcoin.
data.description: A Bitcoin treasury firm listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange has recently joined the FTSE Japan and All-World indices as part of its strategy of increasing Bitcoin purchases. The move reflects the growing acceptance and integration of Bitcoin in the traditional financial markets. This development underscores the company's commitment to expanding its Bitcoin holdings amid the rising popularity of cryptocurrencies among investors. The inclusion in these indices showcases the firm's growing influence and prominence in the market. This decision comes as the firm aims to capitalize on the increasing value and demand for Bitcoin, indicating a significant shift towards digital assets within the global financial landscape.

data.title: Trump family embraces crypto after Biden ‘weaponizes banks’ – Eric Trump reveals they were ‘debanked’ post-2021 Capitol attack.
data.description: Eric Trump, son of former US President Donald Trump, has revealed that their family conglomerate was cut off from banking services following the 2021 Capitol attack. This decision resulted in the company losing access to essential financial operations and accounts. The move signifies a significant blow to the Trump Organization’s financial stability and operations moving forward.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper to acquire JDE Peet's, to split into 2 companies - leading refreshment beverage and global coffee champions. Serving 100+ countries with diverse brand portfolio.
data.description: Merger resulting in the formation of a dominant player in the global coffee industry, catering to over 100 countries. The combined entity will boast an exceptional range of brands spanning all coffee categories, distribution channels, and pricing tiers.

data.title: HYPE token surges as Hayes anticipates 126x growth in Tokyo conference.
data.description: The HYPE token from Hyperliquid witnessed a notable surge in value amongst other tokens for the day. During a conference in Tokyo, financial expert Arthur Hayes predicted a potential upside of 126 times for the HYPE token.

data.title: Kao opens new tertiary amine plant in Pasadena, US with 20,000 tons annual production capacity to meet growing demand in the market.
data.description: In Texas, USA, Kao Corporation (TOKYO:4452) recently inaugurated a new tertiary amine production facility on August 22, 2025. This plant, located in Pasadena, has an impressive annual production capacity of 20,000 tons. The establishment of this plant aims to bolster the supply chain for the U.S. market, which is predicted to expand significantly in the coming years. Local production in the U.S. will not only ensure a stable supply but also optimize Kao's operational efficiency.

data.title: Metaplanet joins FTSE Japan & All-World indexes, attracting passive capital flows into Bitcoin market, bolstering BTC prices.
data.description: Metaplanet's addition to stock indexes will attract substantial passive investments into the Bitcoin market, bolstering BTC's minimum price levels.
